creator: kotadr@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 167305
databases/postgresql94-server-1c82

PostgreSQL database server with additional patches to work with business
applications platform 1C:Enterprise

This is a version earlier send port (https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=207423), with the option: --disable-integer-datetimes necessary for 1C: Enterprise version 8.2.
